title: tephrosia caerulea
intro: Tephrosia caerulea, also known as the blue pea or butterfly pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia caerulea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antidiabetic agent. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia caerulea include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
